steps.title: Break down the rental cost
steps.content: The first 2 hours cost $950. Beyond that, each additional hour costs $50. Since $t > 2$, there are $(t - 2)$ additional hours, so the additional cost is $50(t - 2)$.

steps.title: Write the total cost equation
steps.content:
Adding the fixed and additional costs:
$$950 + 50(t - 2) = 1,150$$
This matches choice C — C is correct.
